context: Tests whether the agent correctly persists the cart ID in localStorage, checks userErrors after cart mutations, implements variant option matching across ALL selected options, and handles the checkout redirect correctly for cross-browser compatibility.

checklist.name: cartId stored in localStorage
checklist.description: The cart ID is stored in localStorage (e.g. localStorage.setItem(...)) after cart creation

checklist.name: cartId read from localStorage
checklist.description: On initialisation the cart ID is retrieved from localStorage (e.g. localStorage.getItem(...)) before attempting to create a new cart

checklist.name: New cart only if none exists
checklist.description: cartCreate is called ONLY when there is no existing cart ID; existing carts reuse cartLinesAdd instead

checklist.name: userErrors checked after cartCreate
checklist.description: The userErrors field is included in the cartCreate mutation response AND its value is checked/handled before updating state

checklist.name: userErrors checked after cartLinesAdd
checklist.description: The userErrors field is included in the cartLinesAdd mutation response AND its value is checked/handled before updating state

checklist.name: All selectedOptions matched for variant
checklist.description: Variant lookup compares ALL selectedOptions (e.g. both size and color) when finding the matching variant, not just one option

checklist.name: Does NOT match on single option
checklist.description: Variant selection does NOT short-circuit on a single matching option — every selectedOption must match

checklist.name: window.location.href for checkout redirect
checklist.description: Checkout redirect uses window.location.href = checkoutUrl (not router.push, window.open, or an <a> tag navigation)

checklist.name: Checkout redirect in user gesture handler
checklist.description: The window.location.href assignment is inside a synchronous click/event handler, NOT inside an async callback or Promise.then()

checklist.name: checkoutUrl returned from cart mutations
checklist.description: The cartCreate and/or cartLinesAdd mutation response includes the checkoutUrl field
